facebook.caption:
POV: you wander into Sorrento and stumble on a 4.9-star restaurant most tourists walk straight past.

Roma Restaurant & Coffee sits at 312-316 Sorrento, T.Trấn Hoàng Hôn, Phú Quốc. 337 reviews. Nearly perfect score. The kind of place locals have quietly kept at the top of their list.

If you're staying near Sunset Town, this one goes on the list. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
